techcrunch.title: NEA’s Tiffany Luck says enterprises are still figuring out their AI ROI
techcrunch.summary: Tokenmaxxing was the hottest trend in Silicon Valley earlier this year, with CEOs encouraging employees to push AI usage as far as it would go. Then the bill came due. Uber reportedly blew through its annual AI budget in a few months, some companies cut Claude licenses for parts of their org, and Meta killed its internal leaderboard.  This tension between […]

techcrunch.title: World leaders want American AI. They just don’t want America to be able to turn it off.
techcrunch.summary: French President Macron and Indian PM Modi raised alarms at the G7 summit that the U.S. could cut off access to American AI overnight  — a fear the Anthropic blackout just made real.

techcrunch.title: Anthropic becomes first AI startup to join the Frontier carbon removal coalition
techcrunch.summary: Anthropic has joined the Frontier coalition, which received another $915M in pledges to fund carbon removal projects.

techcrunch.title: Social media’s next evolution: user-controlled algorithms
techcrunch.summary: Social media feeds are becoming more customizable as platforms like Threads, Instagram, and TikTok introduce tools that let users directly influence the algorithms powering their recommendations.
